prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2024年理科仅招临床医学（本博连读），最低位次约150→248→84→128名，位次极靠前且波动较小；2025年改为物理类后新增护理学专业，校最低位次大幅后 移至约9785名。2025年基准约9785名；本省招生计划2021-2024年理科2-4人，2025年物理类增至12人（含临床医学本博连读2人+护理学10人）；2026年计 划9人（临床医学本博连读2人+儿科学卓越班7人），较2025年缩招25%，护理学取消、新增儿科学，专业结构调整明显。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；上海交通大学软科 主榜约第4名，医学院为国内顶级医学院，临床医学学科评估A+，口腔医学A+，护理学A-；学校层次极高，对考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年上海交通大学声誉评 价偏负面（16事件，11负面），主要涉及学校管理、师德师风、学术不端等，但医学院作为独立招生单位受影响有限；抖音热度排名第42位（较热），未见明显报考热度异常信号；历史投档异常仅2021年河南一次低关注事件，近年无断档记录；临床医学A+（全国顶尖）、口腔医学A+、护理学A-、基础医学A-（通过上海交通大学主体评估 ）；2026年招生专业临床医学（八年制本博连读）对应临床医学A+，儿科学（卓越班）属临床医学二级学科，同样受益于A+学科支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2026年专 业热度推荐，社会认可度高；护理学2026年推荐，但2026年已取消护理学招生；本省2026年普通高考考生约154,000人（ 仅总人数），按2025年物理类占比71.95%估算约110,803人，较2025年物理类83,716人增长约32.3%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争加剧；上海交通大学医学院位于上海市，属一线城市，对内蒙古考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9785名 、2026年缩招25%（供需弹性计算得基准位次约8317名）、本省考生大幅增加约32.3%加剧竞争、专业结构调整（取消护理学、新增儿科学）提升生源质量等因素，在基准位次基础 上进一步小幅修正，预测2026年物理类最低位次约8267名，区间7767-8767名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 暂无（该校2026年仅招2个专业，临床医学为一档，儿科学为三档）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 儿科学（卓越班）（\"5+3\"一体化培养）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 上海交通大学医学院2026年在内蒙古物理类仅招2个专业，临床医学（八年制本博连读）为顶级王牌专业，位次需求极高，建议位次远优于预测区间上限的考生冲刺；儿科学（卓 越班）\"5+3\"一体化培养性价比高，位次在预测区间内的考生可重点考虑。两专业均要求首选物理、再选化学，报考时需注意选科匹配。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, only Clinical Medicine (8-year MD program) was offered in the science category, with minimum rankings approximately 150 → 248 → 84 → 128, extremely high and with small fluctuations; in 2025, after switching to the Physics Category, the Nursing major was added, and the minimum ranking dropped significantly to about 9785. The 2025 baseline is about 9785; provincial enrollment plans were 2-4 students in science from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 12 in the Physics Category in 2025 (including 2 for Clinical Medicine 8-year MD and 10 for Nursing); the 2026 plan is 9 students (2 for Clinical Medicine 8-year MD and 7 for Pediatrics Excellence Class), a 25% reduction from 2025, with Nursing canceled and Pediatrics added, showing a clear adjustment in major structure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Shanghai Jiao Tong University ranks about 4th on the Shanghai Ranking's main list, and its School of Medicine is a top-tier medical school in China, with Clinical Medicine rated A+, Stomatology A+, and Nursing A-; the school's level is extremely high, maintaining strong appeal to candidates; in 2026, Shanghai Jiao Tong University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (16 events, 11 negative), mainly involving school management, teacher ethics, and academic misconduct, but the School of Medicine, as an independent enrollment unit, is limitedly affected; Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with no obvious abnormal signals in application heat; historical admission anomalies include only one low-attention event in Henan in 2021, with no recent gaps in enrollment; Clinical Medicine A+ (top nationally), Stomatology A+, Nursing A-, Basic Medicine A- (through Shanghai Jiao Tong University's main evaluation); the 2026 enrollment majors include Clinical Medicine (8-year MD program) corresponding to Clinical Medicine A+, and Pediatrics (Excellence Class) as a secondary discipline of Clinical Medicine, also benefiting from A+ discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine is recommended for 2026 major popularity, with high social recognition; Nursing was recommended for 2026 but has been canceled for 2026 enrollment; in 2026, the province has about 154,000 regular college entrance exam candidates (total only), estimated at about 110,803 for the Physics Category based on the 2025 Physics Category proportion of 71.95%, an increase of about 32.3% from the 2025 Physics Category of 83,716, significantly increasing candidate numbers and intensifying competition; Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 9785, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 25% (supply-demand elasticity calculation yields a baseline ranking of about 8317), a significant increase of about 32.3% in provincial candidates intensifying competition, and the adjustment of major structure (canceling Nursing, adding Pediatrics) improving student quality, a further minor correction is made on the baseline ranking, predicting the 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking to be about 8267, with a range of 7767-8767.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year MD program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- None (the school only enrolls 2 majors in 2026, with Clinical Medicine as Tier 1 and Pediatrics as Tier 3).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Pediatrics (Excellence Class) ("5+3" integrated training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine only enrolls 2 majors in the Inner Mongolia Physics Category in 2026. Clinical Medicine (8-year MD program) is the top flagship major, requiring extremely high rankings; candidates with rankings far above the upper limit of the predicted range are advised to aim for it. Pediatrics (Excellence Class) "5+3" integrated training offers high cost-effectiveness, and candidates with rankings within the predicted range can focus on it. Both majors require first-choice Physics and second-choice Chemistry; candidates should pay attention to subject matching when applying.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
